api_verification.assessment: /api/simulations/latest selects this newest simulation_runs row and its team_simulation_results rows.

tournament_structure.advancement_rule: Top two in each group plus best eight third-place teams

round_of_32_mapping.implementation: 12 group winners plus the four best runners are seeded against the remaining runners and best third-place teams; a greedy pass avoids same-group rematches.

knockout_model.matchup_definition: Each simulated knockout matchup uses a cached neutral-site elo-context-v4 prediction computed from the current team ratings and validated shot-volume inputs.
knockout_model.draw_handling: A modeled regulation draw is always resolved: 40% via extra time using the pair-specific decisive probability and 60% via penalties with that edge compressed toward 50%.

regulation.confidence_explanation: Medium confidence because the leading outcome is clearly separated; player ratings, match context are unavailable.

anomalies.message: Round-of-32 pairings use deterministic strength seeding and a greedy no-rematch rule, not the official FIFA Annex C mapping.
Group ranking implements points, goal difference, and goals scored, then falls back to team ID; official head-to-head, fair play, and drawing-lots steps are not implemented.
The greedy pairing fallback produced 3795 same-group Round-of-32 rematches in the diagnostic replay.
